accessNotes.en: I Pezonta einai apomonomeni anatoliki akti tis Kalymnou kai gia touristes proseggizetai praktika me skafos, synithos apo to Vathy. Den yparchoun paroches.
accessNotes.gr: Η Πεζόντα είναι απομονωμένη ανατολική ακτή της Καλύμνου και για τουρίστες προσεγγίζεται πρακτικά με σκάφος, συνήθως από το Βαθύ. Δεν υπάρχουν παροχές.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3H source check 2026-05-25: Visit Greece lists Pezonta among secluded Kalymnos beaches accessible only by boat; Unusual Nomad describes Pezonta as remote, without facilities, and usually reached by boat from Vathi.

High-confidence Kalymnos follow-up 2026-06-02: Visit Greece plus local Kalymnos sources support Pezonta as a secluded east-coast beach practically reached by boat, with pebble/rock character and no organized facilities. Hard access remains encoded, so this was not promoted as an easy or ideal recommendation. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 organized audit 2026-05-25: kept organized claim; Platis Gialos Kalymnos sources support parasols/sunbeds or limited sunbed/umbrella service with nearby food/drink.

Kalymnos official evidence pass 2026-06-02: the Municipality of Kalymnos lists Platys Gialos, Visit Greece identifies Platys Gialos as a notable black-sand Kalymnos beach, and AllOverGreece/Stay in Kalymnos support the west-side Panormos-area identity, dark sand/pebbles, nearby food/drink facilities and existing organized-service context. Promoted static metadata confidence only; no windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

accessNotes.en: O Vizotos/Byzotos proseggizetai me pezoporiko monopati apo ton dromo pros Palioniso i apo thalassa. I diadromi einai apomonomeni kai thelei nero/proetoimasia.

Corrected from strict boat-only access to difficult path/sea access.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. Confidence, access, services, amenities, and scoring were not changed.

Kalymnos official evidence pass 2026-06-02: the Municipality of Kalymnos lists Town Beach/Kasonia, and Stay in Kalymnos directly describes Kasonia behind the main port on the road to Therma, with direct city access, sandy shore, tamarisk shade, sunbeds/umbrellas, locker rooms, beach bars and taverns. Promoted static metadata confidence only; no windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

accessNotes.en: Oi piges perigrafoun eykoli prosvasi apo ton dromo pros Palioniso/Skalia i enallaktika prosvasi me skafos apo ti Rina.
accessNotes.gr: Οι πηγές περιγράφουν εύκολη πρόσβαση από τον δρόμο προς Παλιόνησο/Σκάλια ή εναλλακτικά πρόσβαση με σκάφος από τη Ρίνα.
accessNotes.fr: Oi piges perigrafoun eykoli prosvasi apo ton dromo pros Palioniso/Skalia i enallaktika prosvasi me skafos apo ti Rina.
accessNotes.de: Oi piges perigrafoun eykoli prosvasi apo ton dromo pros Palioniso/Skalia i enallaktika prosvasi me skafos apo ti Rina.
accessNotes.it: Oi piges perigrafoun eykoli prosvasi apo ton dromo pros Palioniso/Skalia i enallaktika prosvasi me skafos apo ti Rina.

access.label: Εύκολη οδική πρόσβαση
access.notes: Οι πηγές περιγράφουν εύκολη πρόσβαση από τον δρόμο προς Παλιόνησο/Σκάλια ή εναλλακτικά πρόσβαση με σκάφος από τη Ρίνα.

waterDepth.label: Μέτρια νερά
waterDepth.notes: Οι διαθέσιμες πηγές δεν τεκμηριώνουν καθαρά ρηχά ή βαθιά νερά, οπότε το βάθος μένει ως μέτριο.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 organized audit 2026-05-25: kept organized claim; Palionisos sources support organized or partly equipped beach service with parasols/sun loungers and tavernas.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: AllOverGreece directly supports Palionisos as an east-side Kalymnos pebble beach with very easy road access or boat from Rina, organized umbrellas/sun loungers, tamarisk shade, and taverns on both sides; Meravigliose Isole Greche independently supports the modern road, partial equipment, taverns, and tamarisk shade. Water depth was changed to medium because the reviewed sources do not document a shallow-water claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

accessNotes.en: I Siki/Exo Syki einai kryfi akti sti zoni Palionisou. I prosvasi ginetai me pezoporia kata mikos tis aktis i me mikri metafora me varka apo tin periochi.
accessNotes.gr: Η Σική/Exo Syki είναι κρυφή ακτή στη ζώνη Παλιόνησου. Η πρόσβαση γίνεται με πεζοπορία κατά μήκος της ακτής ή με μικρή μεταφορά με βάρκα από την περιοχή.
accessNotes.fr: I Siki/Exo Syki einai kryfi akti sti zoni Palionisou. I prosvasi ginetai me pezoporia kata mikos tis aktis i me mikri metafora me varka apo tin periochi.
accessNotes.de: I Siki/Exo Syki einai kryfi akti sti zoni Palionisou. I prosvasi ginetai me pezoporia kata mikos tis aktis i me mikri metafora me varka apo tin periochi.
accessNotes.it: I Siki/Exo Syki einai kryfi akti sti zoni Palionisou. I prosvasi ginetai me pezoporia kata mikos tis aktis i me mikri metafora me varka apo tin periochi.

access.label: Δύσκολο μονοπάτι
access.notes: Η Σική/Exo Syki είναι κρυφή ακτή στη ζώνη Παλιόνησου. Η πρόσβαση γίνεται με πεζοπορία κατά μήκος της ακτής ή με μικρή μεταφορά με βάρκα από την περιοχή.

amenities: πρόσβαση με ιδιωτικό ή εκδρομικό σκάφος

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το βάθος συνήθως ανεβαίνει πιο γρήγορα μετά την είσοδο στη θάλασσα.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3H source check 2026-05-25: Climbook describes Exo Syki above a hidden white beach on the Palionisos coast, reached by a coastal path from near Taverna Kalidonis or by boat; Mapcarta/OSM places Syki Beach near Palionisos. Corrected from strict boat-only access to difficult path/boat access.

accessNotes.en: I Paralia Sykatis einai apomonomenos mikros kolpos kai proseggizetai mono apo thalassa i apo monopati apo ton Ormo Palioniso. Den yparchoun paroches.
accessNotes.gr: Η Παραλία Συκάτης είναι απομονωμένος μικρός κόλπος και προσεγγίζεται μόνο από θάλασσα ή από μονοπάτι από τον Όρμο Παλιόνησο. Δεν υπάρχουν παροχές.

metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Batch 3H source check 2026-05-25: AllOverGreece states Sykati can only be reached by sea or by path from Ormos Palionisos and has no tourist facilities; 27crags backs the Palionisos road plus 30-minute path approach to the Sykati cave/beach area. Corrected from strict boat-only access to difficult path/sea access.
